hindi: अम्बे तू है जगदम्बे काली। जय दुर्गे खप्पर वाली॥
english: O Amba, you are Jagadamba Kali; victory to Durga who holds a skull-cup
roman: Ambe Tu Hai Jagdambe Kali, Jai Durge Khappar Wali

hindi: तेरे भक्त जनों पर माया। तू भंडारी है चौदह लोक की माया॥
english: Your grace rests upon your devotees; you are the keeper of the wealth of fourteen worlds
roman: Tere Bhakt Janon Par Maya, Tu Bhandari Hai Chaudah Lok Ki Maya

english: O Amba, you are Jagadamba Kali

hindi: सुर नर मुनि जन सेवत, कालका खप्पर वाली। तेरे दर्शन के लिए, नित आते हैं थाली॥
english: Gods, humans and sages serve Kalika who holds the skull-cup; they come daily with offerings for your darshan
roman: Sur Nar Muni Jan Sevat Kalika Khappar Wali, Tere Darshan Ke Liye Nit Aate Hain Thali

english: O Amba, you are Jagadamba Kali

hindi: माँ की आरती जो कोई नर गावे। कष्ट निवारे सकल, भव पार हो जावे॥
english: Whoever sings this aarti of Mother; all troubles are resolved and one crosses the ocean of existence
roman: Maa Ki Aarti Jo Koi Nar Gaave, Kasht Nivare Sakal Bhav Paar Ho Jaave

hindi: अम्बे तू है जगदम्बे काली। जय दुर्गे खप्पर वाली॥
english: O Amba, you are Jagadamba Kali; victory to Durga
roman: Ambe Tu Hai Jagdambe Kali, Jai Durge Khappar Wali
